title: Random EoE thoughts
wikitext:
[]: Random EoE thoughts             Quote Post by COACH » Sat Mar 19, 2011 8:50 am So, I was reading volume 12 of the manga, and I noticed a few things that never occured to me before, while watching End of Evangelion. None of these things were exclusive to the manga, so I guess I'm only noticing these things now because it's easier to sit there and study a panel instead of watching all of this stuff happen in a movie. 1) So, when Asuka is moved from room 303 and placed inside of Eva-02, whoever moved her had time to strip her naked and put her in her plugsuit, even though they should be in a hurry? (Ok, that's being really nitpicky. Sue me. ) 2) A bunch of N2 mines(?) don't do a thing to the umbilical cable, but a spray of bullets can cut it clean in half? (You'd think these kids would have a way to protect the cable with the A.T. Field.) 3) The Mass Production Evas move around before the Dummy Plugs is inserted? I guess it's possible, because Yui has moved without power or a plug before, but it was usually in a dire situation. Something to do with the S2 engine? Sorry if any of these dumb questions have been asked before.

[]: Re: Random EoE thoughts             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Mar 19, 2011 8:59 am 1) The hospital gown came off easily (just ask Shinji!) Ditto ripping off what would in reality be disposable incontinence pants (with easy-tear sides). Then it's just a matter of sliding her into the oversize suit and letting it form-fit as they went. 3) Possibly remote control?

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Sat Mar 19, 2011 9:04 am Regarding #2, the force of the explosions would probably have been diffused across a wider area.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Mar 19, 2011 9:09 am 1) they had plenty of time to do that. The plugsuit offers benefits for synchrorate so it's worth doing as far as I can tell N2 mines never had direct hit on the cable

[]: Re: Random EoE thoughts             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Mar 19, 2011 9:24 am COACH wrote: 3) The Mass Production Evas move around before the Dummy Plugs is inserted? I guess it's possible, because Yui has moved without power or a plug before, but it was usually in a dire situation. Something to do with the S2 engine?

[]: Re: Random EoE thoughts             Quote Post by COACH » Sat Mar 19, 2011 9:34 am Mr. Tines wrote: 1) The hospital gown came off easily (just ask Shinji!) Ditto ripping off what would in reality be disposable incontinence pants (with easy-tear sides). Then it's just a matter of sliding her into the oversize suit and letting it form-fit as they went. 3) Possibly remote control?

[]: Re: Random EoE thoughts             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Mar 19, 2011 9:37 am COACH wrote: Right, but the reason I even noticed anything is because somebody said that Asuka wasn't going to sortie, since she was a vegetable and all. She was just hiding.

[]:             Quote Post by KogareruAsuka » Sat Mar 19, 2011 11:13 am 1) wouldn't you?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Mar 19, 2011 12:29 pm She NEEDED to be in her plugsuit (or at least in something red) - This is the part where her character comes to "full bloom" (Before she is killed, of course" she NEEDS her trademark color! (which is also the color of life -> Asuka is, in this scene, motivated by her drive to survive/Eros/Id etc....) The white hospital gown would make her look fragile - now how does that go with the bestial carnage we get to see? Nope. Red. Definitely red. The entire plot is a metaphor anyway, so a little logic can be sacrificed for color symbolism - and the suit DOES boost the synch ratio.

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Sat Mar 19, 2011 12:36 pm 2) There is nothing to suggest those really were N2 mines instead of conventional depth charges. Actually, given that they blast the top of Geofront open with something that probably is a N2 bomb, I'd say it's likely they only used run-of-the-mill depth charges on Unit-02. Also, the cable is cut off with an explosion. This suggests that it was shot with some kind of explosive, and nevertheless the impact of an actual shell (with fittingly chosen parameters as speed and shell weight) can easily be more destructive to its point of impact than a blast wave of an explosion that happens nearby, especially if we want to start fanwank around with the strength of construction of umbilical cable. FWIW with evangelion size fluctuation, the fair bit of size difference between those depth charges in EoE and Rei's N2 mine in ep 19 does actually suggest they didn't drop N2 mines on Unit-02: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Random EoE thoughts             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Mar 19, 2011 1:43 pm Adding my (largely redundant at this point) voice to the chorus: COACH wrote: 1) So, when Asuka is moved from room 303 and placed inside of Eva-02, whoever moved her had time to strip her naked and put her in her plugsuit, even though they should be in a hurry? (Ok, that's being really nitpicky. Sue me. )

[]: Re: Random EoE thoughts             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Mar 19, 2011 1:45 pm COACH wrote: Didn't they make growling noises too? Or am I remembering wrong?

[]: Re: Random EoE thoughts             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Mar 20, 2011 9:49 am SaltyJoe wrote: Not a peep till they got jacked up with the Dummy Plugs.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Mon Mar 21, 2011 8:59 am Here's a question I've haven't seen anyone bring up before: What happened to Maya when she passed through GNR's hand? What did she see? Clearly she went through something... traumatic, but it's never hinted at what she actually experienced. And except for the minor detail of the world ending, she seemed relatively fine later, so it wasn't Cthulhuian enough to give her a BSOD.

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Mon Mar 21, 2011 9:13 am Fireand'chutes77 wrote: Here's a question I've haven't seen anyone bring up before: What happened to Maya when she passed through GNR's hand? What did she see? Clearly she went through something... traumatic, but it's never hinted at what she actually experienced. And except for the minor detail of the world ending, she seemed relatively fine later, so it wasn't Cthulhuian enough to give her a BSOD.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Mon Mar 21, 2011 9:40 am IIRC, first they nuked the Geofront to blast it open, then they saturated the place with rocket artillery, then went a notch deeper and dumped a crapload of depth charges in the lake.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Mar 21, 2011 9:50 pm Fireand'chutes77 wrote: What happened to Maya when she passed through GNR's hand?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Mar 21, 2011 10:00 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: She got fingered by a giant, naked, goddess. Don't you think you'd freak out?

Sorry if any of these dumb questions have been asked before.

And except for the minor detail of the world ending, she seemed relatively fine later, so it wasn't Cthulhuian enough to give her a BSOD.
